title: lvm2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.03.32-2]
- Fix vgremove hanging immediately after lockstart.
- Add repair option for RAID volumes with too many transiently failed devices.

[2.03.32-1]
- Update to upstream version 2.03.32.
- See WHATS_NEW and WHATS_NEW_DM for more information.
full_text:
[2.03.32-2]
- Fix vgremove hanging immediately after lockstart.
- Add repair option for RAID volumes with too many transiently failed devices.

[2.03.32-1]
- Update to upstream version 2.03.32.
- See WHATS_NEW and WHATS_NEW_DM for more information.

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20577-0.html
